inc-pothole-school.title: Severe Deep Pothole Near Oakwood Elementary School Crosswalk

location.displayAddress: 350 Oakwood Street, near School Main Gate

aiAnalysis.explanation: The pothole is directly in front of an elementary school pedestrian crosswalk, presenting an immediate safety risk to children, parents, and school buses.

inc-streetlight-resolved.title: Completely Dark Streetlight Block on Elm Street

aiAnalysis.explanation: Multiple non-functioning streetlights make the block extremely dark, increasing petty crime risk but not representing an active immediate hazard.

inc-water-leakage.title: Gushing Fresh Water Leakage from Main Line under Sidewalk

aiAnalysis.explanation: Potable water is gushing out rapidly, flooding the sidewalk and wasting clean water, with moderate erosion risk under the concrete.

inc-garbage-overflow.title: Massive Commercial Garbage Overflow Behind Market Square Mall

location.displayAddress: Market Square Service Alleyway, near loading dock B

aiAnalysis.explanation: Uncollected refuse is rotting, causing bad odors and attracting pests (rats/birds). It constitutes a health hazard but is confined to the alley.

inc-illegal-dumping.title: Illegal Dumping of Dangerous Construction Waste and Asbestos Tiles

aiAnalysis.explanation: Dumping contains construction debris and high risk of loose asbestos materials. Poses direct respiratory hazards to park visitors and children.

inc-pothole-dup1.title: Tire Damaging Pothole in Middle of Highway Lane

aiAnalysis.explanation: High speed traffic hitting a deep pothole poses extreme risk of vehicle loss of control and pileup.

inc-electrical-hazard.title: Exposed Live Wires from Damaged Junction Box on Sidewalk

location.displayAddress: 890 Castro Street, in front of Metro Station

aiAnalysis.explanation: Exposed live wiring in a heavily trafficked pedestrian area during high humidity. Immediate fatal electrocution hazard.

inc-resolved-water.title: Burst Water Pipe Flooding Residential Front Yards

aiAnalysis.explanation: Flooding poses immediate risk of property damage to basement levels and structural soil settling.

inc-resolved-sanitation.title: Dead Animal Carcass Blocking Sidewalk Near Bus Stop

aiAnalysis.explanation: Biological hazard directly in front of public transit boarding point. Attracts pests and represents disease transmission vector.

inc-drainage-block.title: Completely Blocked Storm Drain Causing Street Inundation

aiAnalysis.explanation: Drain blockage is causing 6-inch deep pooling across half the road, creating a severe hydroplaning hazard for fast moving traffic.

roads.name: Roads & Maintenance
roads.description: Handles potholes, road damage, asphalt repairs, and public pathways.

electrical.name: Electrical Services
electrical.description: Responsible for streetlighting, exposed wiring, traffic signals, and electrical hazards.

water.name: Water Services
water.description: Manages burst pipes, water mains, drainage blockages, and clean water leakage.

sanitation.name: Sanitation Department
sanitation.description: Maintains city cleanliness, garbage collection, illegal dumping removal, and waste bins.

general.name: General Administration
general.description: General municipal issues, policy queries, or complex issues spanning multiple departments.
